select: SELECT l.log_number, l.user_number, u.user_nickname, l.log_title, l.log_post, l.log_date, l.log_modify_date, ( SELECT li.log_img_path FROM ddd_log_img li WHERE li.log_number = l.log_number AND li.log_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(li2.log_img_number) FROM ddd_log_img li2 WHERE li2.log_number = l.log_number ) ) AS representative_img_path FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number WHERE l.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY l.log_date DESC
